title: pelargonium × selenifolium
intro: Pelargonium × selenifolium, also known as the Cape Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, originating from South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × selenifolium include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to act as an immune system booster. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
